reviews.review_description: It's very hard for me to join codes because it's like even when the code is not full, I still can't join it for some reason. Overall, this game is low-key. Good. You just need better speed, and probably better monsters. If I'm being fr it's better than that, I would expect from a regular game, but right now I'm just rated 5 Stars.

the good thing is that theres a Lot to see, Features, Monsters Maps. But if you are done seeing everything it kinda gets boring. There are some Unique things but not enough to earn more stars. and then theres the Fact that this game is Strongly Inspired by CGH which means i obviously cant give it more then 3 Stars. i still have to say im very impressed by ED1 cus he has improved way more since last time ive seen him work on a game

Honestly, this game is really good. The CCU is pretty low, but I get how the owner can’t buy more because of low money or anything other than that but yeah overall this game is so amazing. I definitely would recommend.

so listen guys all i can say is i hated this game they ban me for 3 weeks but it's been about a year and they still haven't banned me so me and my friends it started with my friend they reported the game because they also got banned i mean i got banned for reason and two other of my friends did get banned for a reason but most of them didn't forget they got banned for no reason and also one thing we all report the game because one they just banned people forever and don't care about unbanning so i'm honestly happy this game got turned to this slop
